metadata.description: Low-level target: regenerates the Angular TypeScript client from the OpenAPI spec using openapi-generator-cli. Safe to run at any time. src/custom/ and src/public-api.ts are NOT touched — they are the hand-written layer. NOTE: to regenerate from scratch (spec + client), use the high-level 'agentos-service:generate-client' target which orchestrates generate-openapi-spec → this target.
